parameters.content:
reMarkable PDF preview analysis

Connect your existing Telegram Trigger to Prepare Remarkable PDF Preview.

This route is for scanned/handwritten reMarkable PDFs:
- uses the Telegram PDF preview image for OpenAI visual analysis
- creates an Obsidian Markdown note
- links to the original PDF saved by the existing PDF route

Keep the original PDF upload route active. Disable or remove the old Extract Remarkable PDF Text markdown branch to avoid duplicate notes.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ $json.bodyJson || JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', input: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: 'SKIP_DIRECT_REMARKABLE_BRANCH_DO_NOT_WRITE' }] }], temperature: 0, max_output_tokens: 20 }) }}

parameters.text: ={{  'reMarkable-notitie verwerkt: ' + $('Build Remarkable OCR Markdown').first().json.title + ' - opgeslagen in Obsidian/Inbox/Remarkable/' + $json.name }}

={{  'reMarkable-notitie verwerkt: ' + $('Build Remarkable PNG OCR Markdown').first().json.title + ' - opgeslagen in Obsidian/Inbox/Remarkable/' + $('Build Remarkable PNG OCR Markdown').first().json.fileName }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ $json.bodyJson || JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', input: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: 'SKIP_DIRECT_REMARKABLE_BRANCH_DO_NOT_WRITE' }] }], temperature: 0, max_output_tokens: 20 }) }}

message.caption: Titel: Test na Analyze-fix en PNG-routing
